Bus Timings

A1 Airport Bus Schedule Abu Dhabi Airport ECC to Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque

July 6, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi Airport Bus A1 Timetable- For those of you who want to travel to Abu Dhabi, please don’t worry about the transportation when you arrive at the airport. Abu Dhabi, the capital of the United Arab Emirates, offers an extensive bus service operated by the Department of Transport (DoT).

We know that Abu Dhabi has international airport named Zayed International Airport and one of the facilities at the airport is about bus transportation. Yes, there are so many kind of bus route that connected to many places in the city, one of them is Bus A1. Contents

Abu Dhabi Airport Bus A1 Timetable

the very good thing about a1 bus is that it operates every day and 24 hours with arrival frequency around 30-60 minutes. So, for those of you who want to take this bus, you don’t need to wait long for the bus to arrive. And here we show you about Abu Dhabi Airport bus a1 timetable.

From Abu Dhabi Airport ECC From Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque
06:00 06:02
06:40 06:42
07:20 07:22
08:00 08:02
08:40 08:42
09:20 09:22
10:00 10:02
10:40 10:42
11:20 11:22
12:00 12:02
12:40 12:42
13:20 13:22
14:00 14:02
14:40 14:42
15:20 15:22
16:00 16:02
16:40 16:42
17:20 17:22
18:00 18:02
18:40 18:42
19:20 19:22
20:00 20:02
20:40 20:42
21:20 21:22
22:00 22:02
22:40 22:42
23:20  

Download PDF Bus A1

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for A1 Bus Timings.## About A1 Bus

The A1 bus service in Abu Dhabi connects the city with Abu Dhabi International Airport. It’s a convenient and cost-effective mode of transportation for travelers going to and from the airport.Read Also: [Abu Dhabi A2 Bus Route and Timetable](https://uaetiming. It’s a good option for those looking for an alternative to taxis or private cars.

The A1 bus (Terminal 2) travels through 33 stops, starting from St 2 / City Air Terminal and concluding its journey at Terminal 2.## A1 Bus Routes

St 2 / City Air Terminal

  1. Al Firdous St / City Air Terminal

  2. St 2 / Abu Dhabi Mall

  3. Zayed 1st St / Electra Park

  4. Zayed 1st St / Shk Zayed St

  5. Zayed 1st St / Adcb

  6. Zayed 1st St / Masjid Afra Bint Ahmed

  7. Zayed 1st St / Al Reef Hospital

  8. Zayed 1st St / St 10

  9. Sultan Bin Zayed St / Madinat Zayed Shopping Centre

  10. Sultan Bin Zayed St / Gold Center

  11. Sultan Bin Zayed St / Central Post Office

  12. Sultan Bin Zayed St / Al Falah St

  13. Sultan Bin Zayed St / Masjid Mariam Bint Said

  14. Sultan Bin Zayed St / Hazaa Bin Zayed St

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Abu Dhabi Bus Station

  2. Sultan Bin Zayed St / Mohamed Bin Khalifa St

  3. Shk Rashid Bin Saeed St / Rosary School

  4. Shk Rashid Bin Saeed St / Immigration Department

  5. Shk Rashid Bin Saeed St / Mushrif Mall

  6. Rabdan St / Ministry Of Foreign Trade

  7. St 3 / Adnec

  8. Saif Ghobash St / St 17

  9. Saif Ghobash St / Zayed Sports Stadium

  10. Saif Ghobash St / Al Noor Hospital

  11. Saif Ghobash St / Ministry Of Interior

27.

  1. Al Khaleej Al Arabi St / Police Check Point

  2. Terminal 1

  3. Cargo Terminal

  4. Airport Free Zone

  5. Police Station

  6. Terminal 2

Some other Abu Dhabi bus routes you can check out include the Airport Bus A2 route, which runs from Abu Dhabi Airport ECC to Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Street, and the M3 route, which travels from Abu Dhabi University Main Gate to Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI.## Price and Facilities

The A1 bus service in Abu Dhabi typically offers modern buses equipped with air conditioning and facilities such as wheelchair access and designated seating for women and families. The exact price and facilities may vary based on any updates or changes made by the Department of Transport (DoT) in Abu Dhabi.

The cost of the ticket is around 4 AED, so it is very cheap price and very affordable for the tourist.## Journey Experience

A journey on the A1 bus route from Abu Dhabi Airport ECC to Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque offers a smooth and extended ride through key parts of the city.

The journey ends at Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque, a peaceful stop near residential communities.

The service operates 24 hours a day, with departures scheduled approximately every 40 minutes, making it accessible to passengers at various times throughout the day and night. While the exact price and facilities may vary, the A1 bus typically provides an affordable and efficient way to travel within Abu Dhabi.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 6, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
